source_intake_record.raw_question_text: Rhombus $QRST$ has an area of 137.9 square meters. If $RT$ is 12.2 meters, find $QS$.
extraction_notes: 题干中含有“<image>”标记，但未提供可用的图片路径/URL/文件名

issues: metadata.image_paths contains a PIL object representation rather than a concrete image path.

image_dependency: question_text is fully self-contained and states the needed quantities in text
requires_image=false and text_dominant=true indicate low reliance on the image
although an image exists in asset_registry_record, no visual attribute or spatial reading is explicitly required
multi_step: solving requires recalling the rhombus area/diagonal relation A = (d1 * d2) / 2
the target value QS is obtained by rearranging the formula using area 137.9 and RT 12.2
this is a short geometry-plus-arithmetic workflow, but not a long chain of reasoning
verifiability: answer_type is numeric and answer_text='22.6' is a clear checkable target
the problem data provides all required values, so a deterministic calculation can verify correctness
registry_passed=true and answer_present=true support reliable downstream checking
